title: gonolobus luridus
intro: Gonolobus luridus, also known as the green-flowered Gonolobus or the green-flowered milkweed vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Gonolobus luridus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and its herbal preparations are typically used externally to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
